_comment: cave-home-mqtt panels — Phase 1. Real Grafana JSON lands here once observability M3 is live. Planned panels: packets in / out per second (by packet_type — CONNECT/CONNACK/PUBLISH/SUBSCRIBE/PUBACK/...), connected clients (instant + 24h peak), bytes in / out per second, var-int decode errors per minute, unsupported packet-type rejects per minute, malformed protocol-name / bad protocol-level rejects (CONNECT), bad QoS rejects (PUBLISH), retained-message store size, in-flight QoS-1 messages by client_id, topic cardinality (active vs retained), CONNACK return-code distribution.
